analysis: The project is a black holes themed website with existing CSS, HTML, and JavaScript files. The current implementation includes sections about black holes, their formation, types, effects, and a quiz. However, the CSS lacks the full cosmic theme with animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. The HTML and JavaScript need completion to ensure all sections are properly included and functional.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with the full intended dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. Ensure the CSS file includes all necessary styles for the black hole theme, animations, and interactive elements.

Complete the HTML content to ensure all sections are properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes. Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices.

Complete the JavaScript content to ensure all functions are properly implemented. Fix the syntax errors in the showSlide function and complete the JavaScript content to ensure all functions are properly implemented. Add event listeners and functionality for the new buttons added in test-website/index.html.
